# Summary

(one or two sentences on what this PR changes)

# Type of change

- [ ] New control
- [ ] Edit to existing control (bump version + add changelog)
- [ ] Framework mapping addition / correction
- [ ] Code / site change
- [ ] Documentation

# Checklist for content PRs

- [ ] Schema validates locally (`npm run validate`)
- [ ] All required fields populated
- [ ] At least 3 ToD procedures, inquiries, inspections
- [ ] At least 3 ToOE procedures with sample-size guidance
- [ ] At least 3 framework mappings with valid references
- [ ] At least 2 authoritative references
- [ ] Changelog updated (initial entry for new controls; new entry + version bump for edits)

# Author attribution

Suggested `reviewed_by` or `author` update (if any):
